title: Review: wallet round 20
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — 5 new correctness bugs found across scanner reconnect, block ordering, balance display, and tx attribution. None are exploitable by remote adversaries but 2 (nie-8fbh.2 monotonicity, nie-8fbh.7 tx record) could cause silent data corruption on the happy path.
Confidence: 15% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) gRPC stream behavior under real lightwalletd implementations not exercised in tests; (2) interaction between the scanner's tokio task and the payment task over the single-connection SQLite pool is subtle. Would raise confidence if: integration tests run scanner + send_payment concurrently, and if block-height monotonicity is tested with a mock that delivers out-of-order blocks.
